feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA readiness check: check failure
entry.content:
Hey there!

we are facing the following issue when executing the ATC checks for S/4HANA readiness:

 

 

 

Object not checkable, due to inconsistent configuration: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																									
Check failures: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																																																																		
Object Name:RSNAST00  	 Object Type: PROG
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V60A  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V61B  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.

 

 

 

 

At least the 1st failure come from an enhancement.

We have not figured out where the other two check failures come from.

Additionally the mentioned namespace /0SJ1G/ seems weird, because none of the objects belong to this namespace.

The reason why we cannot ignore these check failures is, that it prevents us from selecting the check run with "Analyze result in ATC problems view". If we do, no findings will be displayed.

From our point of view there are not SAP-notes that fit to the problem.

System information:

SAP_BASIS 758
SAP_ABA 75I

Does anyone have a clue, what we could check?

The system says: the SAP-owned namespace is in scope. But how can this namespace be in scope if we explicitely select a different package in the check run and mark "Include Objects from checkable namespaces"?

Thanks for any hint!

/edit:

I know put the enhancements in a new package and excluded this package from the search run. Now there are no more errors. But: The findings cannot be displayed. I found out that the following error in eclipse ATC problems view occurred:

An internal error occurred during: "Displaying result in ATC Problems View".

System failure: "SQL error SQL code: 4 occurred while accessing table SATC_CI_CF_E_BASE_NAC." (For detailed information, check the generated short dump in transaction ST22 of system "F4S")

/edit2

it seems as if the error ocurred only once. there is still "Findings: None", but no error anymore.

entry.title: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same project in same system different client
entry.content:
Hi

I am working with a new system S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023 01 (02/2024) FPS. Anyone had similar issue?

1. I create a project in Client 100 (staging) using the fiori app "migrate your data".

2. I look at the project in Client 400 - the approach shown is "Migrate Data Using Staging Tables (old)". Obviously I couldn't create the project with old approach in a new system that has 2023 from beginning.

In client 100 it is correctly showing "Migrate Data Using Staging Tables".

3. I can't edit in 400 (wrong message that created with LTMC) and I can't change the client to 400 (dump with message "Project not found; Use F4 help to select a Project - Character String as Message" -> no message ID.

4. I tried to find a solution and saw that table /LTB/MC_PROJ has an entry in 100 but not in 400. I copied the entry directly to 400 and the approach changed and I could change the client in LTMOM -> the same moment the entry got deleted in client 100 and then had the same "wrong" approach "Migrate Data Using Staging Tables (old)". and the same issues in100 as before in 400.

Anybody having the same issues? I haven't found any note yet or any description of this error but it's doesn't increase my trust in the migration cockpit.

Thanks!

Best regards

Klaus

entry.title: Backend system for S4 hana public cloud 2402 for debugging purposes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working with the latest version of S/4 hana public cloud 2402 and we are in the process of migrating data using migration cockpit fiori app.

I found a way to get the name of the API (FM) responsible for the migration of each SAP Migration Object.

I am afraid of the errors that the APIs will throw in the future when migrating data (because of missing customizing, or data issues etc...) and would like to know how can I access the backend system for this S4 Cloud Public Edition system, in order to be able to debug the APIs in case of migration errors. 

Thanks

Sad

entry.title: KBA 3452616 bank migration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support, I've created the memo record but how can I make the journal entry? I've check also KBA 3452616 but can't find this. We have to migrate the begin balance of our bank.

Best regards,

Rene Vijverberg

entry.title: Can I apply WBS elements at item level on service orders using migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I am currently working on sap Public cloud. I would want to know if it is possible to add WBS elements at item level on service orders using migration cockpit. 

As I can understand, this object is not available on the standard cockpit and I think we can upload a template with the "Mapping of Work Breakdown Structure Element (WBS Element)" but when I apply it and check for updates on the template, there is no change or new zone dedicated for WBS elements. there is any document explaining that process? 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4HANA with Qlik Sense
entry.content:
Hello,

Need advice on the best strategy for migrating from SAP ECC to S/4HANA while using Qlik Sense: should we maintain daily data extractions with Qlik using SAP tables, or opt to use CDS views? Bearing in mind that the latter option would require a complete adaptation of all Qlik applications? If so, would this adaptation be sensible and easy to undertake?

Thanks!

entry.title: Regarding Master Recipe upload Migration Object in PP
entry.content:
Have any Data Migration Object for Master Recipe upload like as EN_Routing?

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Moving a part of existing "On-Premise ECC" to "SAP S/4 HANA Cloud"
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a Production ECC System which is on EHP7 Non-Unicode.

It has 2 Production Work Clients - Clients A and B.

Client-A of it is being used for HR and GCS. 

Client-B is being used for Plant Maintenance, Finance and Quality Mgmt.

We are looking on the Option to move a part of one of the "Client-A only i.e. GCS to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud" whereas others will still be on On-Premise itself.

Please help with the possible Options/approaches in moving with this scenario from On-Premise ECC to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud without disturbing the others.

Thanks.

Regards,

Gowtham

entry.title: Work center hierarchy migration object does not exist in S/4HANA 2023 version
entry.content:
During the creation of the migration object with regards to the work center hierarchy, the object didn´t list into the migration cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Data Migration by creating copies. Best Approach?
entry.content:
I have a client that needs to replace all Material Master data with copies of new Materials (This is being done to enable Batch Split Valuation). So after creating new materials, we need to create new BOMs, recipes, production versions, inspection plans, Batch masters, Move Stock, purchase info records, sales conditions records. Can someone help me out with identifying BAPIs for this process. I need to be able to extract the existing data, change the material code and upload the new data.

I've found BAPI/FM for some of the master datas

1. Material Master - BAPI_MATERIAL_GETALL , BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA , BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA

2. BOM - CSAP_MAT_BOM_READ , CSAP_MAT_BOM_MAINTAIN

3. Recipe -

4. Production Version -

5. Batches -

6. Stock - BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE , BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

7. Purchase Info Record -

8. Sales Condition Record -

entry.title: Material Sales Org Distr Channel Customer not found
entry.content:
When attempting to transfer data directly from ECC to S4, I get the errors, "Material XXX in sales org. 1030 distribution channel 10 is not defined" and "Material Sales Org Distr Channel Customer not found".  The material does exist in S4 in that sales org/dc.  I am not quite sure about the 2nd error, since the customer has also been extended to the 1030/10 sales org./dc.

In addition, for some records I got the message Text type “” has not been defined

However, I am able to create the above directly with the fiori app/SAP GUI.

Anyone came across this?

entry.title: Migration Cockpit for migrate from SAP TM Cloud extra stack
entry.content:
Does anyone know if we can use a Migration Cockpit for migrate from SAP TM Cloud extra stack to TM 

embedded SAP S/4HANA?

entry.title: Business Partner : Contact Person : Standard Relationship : how to set in Data Migration or CVI ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Context :

  • Data Migration of customers : ECC 6.0 --> S/4HANA (using Migration Cockpit - Direct Approach)
  • The Contact Persons and the relationships are well migrated. 

However, I do not see a way to set the flag "Standard Relationship" (which is field BUT050-XDFREL) in the migration object "Customer".

How can I set the flag "Standard Relationship" in Data Migration (or in the CVI setup ?)

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Internal numbers mapping table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have loaded some materials using internal numbers in the Cockpit, which is fine.  However, we'd like to get a definitive mapping of the dummy numbers used in the load file (1,2,3, etc) to the ones appearing in MARA (70012345, 70012346, etc.).  Sadly, the system has jumbled them up (in blocks) so it's not just a case of referencing the last 1400 materials created in order.  (I know they are out of alignment as I have done an XLOOKUP on the material text.)  Where can we get this mapping, please?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Function module CNV_PE_S4_RFCFM_ORG_DERIV missing?
entry.content:
Hi,

my collegue is configuring a migration project on our S/4H 2022 onPremise server.

Migration ApproachMigrate Data Directly from SAP System
ScenarioSAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA
Connection to Source System<RFC connection to ERP6.0 EHP8 with IDES>

The process stops with an error message (see attachment) after clicking "create project". There is an error with no detail regarding the function module CNV_PE_S4_RFCFM_ORG_DERIV. This function module does only exist on the S/4H system, but not on the ERP system. Do we have to install something on the ERP system?

Best Regards,

Christian

entry.title: LTMOM Migration Cockpit - how to filter on one table with two fields in key?
entry.content: I would like to ask how to migrate standard PM data (table like PLKO) where in the key fields in source tables are two fields - I have a list of documents to be migrated, how can I filter them using two fields in filter? Is there only option to have the documents listed in new Z Table, and to use BADI either in selection in source system, or in skip rule with ABAP code in destination system?

entry.title: EHS Data Migration for SAP S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to migrate the data of the EHS module in the S/4hana on-premise system using the staging table method—data such as chemical substance, risk, control, and compliance requirements for OEL. There is no standard template for these data in the Migration Cockpit app. I would be grateful if anyone has a solution for this problem.

Regards

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit Master Recipe template uses non-standard field codes
entry.content:
With all the other DMC templates, the technical field name used can be found in the relevant table (even if you have to hunt a bit for the table).  They are all there.  However, for this one pack, they are very different.  For example, for the Receipe Group, the field in the pack is MASTERRECIPEGROUP and not PLNNR in table PLKO, PLPO, etc.  When the data was originally loaded, a custom template was used (which in itself is odd, as it is the only one) which I have.  This contains the real codes, so for example PLNNR is used.  

So, has anyone actually used this standard Master Recipe template and, if so, did it work fine or was a huge amount of mapping needed?

Thanks.

entry.title: Error in uploading GL's in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing the error while uploading the gl's in S4Hana using app.

Please provide the solution for that issue.

 

Thanks in advance.
